verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some glad morning we shall see Jesus in the air, Coming after you and me Joy is ours to share; What rejoicing there will be when the saints shall rise, Headed for that jubilee yonder in the skies.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, what singing Oh, what shouting, On that happy morning when we all shall rise; Oh, what glory, hallelujah, When we meet our blessed Savior in the skies.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Seems that now I almost see all the sainted dead, Rising for that jubilee that is just ahead; In a twinkling of an eye, Changed with them to be; All the living saints to fly to that jubilee!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When with all the heavenly host we begin to sing, Singing in the Holy Ghost, how the heav'ns will ring; Millions there will join the song, with them we shall be; Praising Christ thru ages long, Heaven's jubilee
